response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems design, which are non-negotiable minimum qualifications; their experience is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or C++-centric systems architecture.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across multiple languages and domains
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
Proven ability to lead ambiguous projects and build scalable tools (e.g., GISCollective)
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years of C++ programming as required
Lacks demonstrable experience in cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale
No record of technical leadership in cloud or DevOps engineering teams
